cora.embeddingsModel.markdownDescription:
Name of the local Ollama model to use for generating embeddings (e.g. `bge-m3`).

⚠️ **WARNING**: Changing this value will automatically invalidate the project's vector cache, forcing a recalculation of embeddings for all documents.

cora.ollamaPort.markdownDescription: Local port on which the Ollama server is running (e.g. `11434`).

cora.filterTitles.markdownDescription: If active, excludes headers/titles (lines starting with one or more `#`) from the suggested results in the Smart Context panel.

cora.textconverterPath.markdownDescription: Absolute path to the TextConverter project root directory (e.g. C:\path\to\TextConverter). If empty, document conversion will be disabled.

cora.textconverterCodeParsing.markdownDescription: If active, TextConverter will attempt to detect code blocks during conversion (recommended).

cora.textconverterExtractHtml.markdownDescription: If active, TextConverter will apply main content extraction from HTML pages (removes header/footer/boilerplate).

cora.stripLinksAndImages.markdownDescription: If active, strips all Markdown links (keeping only the link text) and removes all Markdown images from the converted source documents.

cora.semanticScholarApiKey.markdownDescription: Optional API key for Semantic Scholar to prevent 'Too Many Requests' (429) rate limiting errors.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
